bench_setup.notes: Stage 1 no-wire functional test. ADC3 (D3 domain, 0x58026000) reads internal temperature sensor (CH18, IN18). CKMODE=10 (HCLK/2=32MHz), TSEN=bit23, PCSEL bit18 required (H7-unique). Accept range: 0x0800..0xF000 (16-bit). On PASS: detail0=raw ADC reading. On FAIL: 0xE001=VREG, 0xE002=ADEN, 0xE003=EOC, 0xE004=out of range. No loopback wiring required.
